title: draba mutabilis
intro: Draba mutabilis, also known as the variable draba, is a small, annual or biennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Draba mutabilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Draba mutabilis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
